title: Neobotrydium carinatum
benefits: I couldn't find any information about the health benefits of Neobotrydium carinatum.
constituents: Unfortunately, I don't have enough information on Neobotrydium carinatum to provide details about its active constituents.
intro: Neobotrydium carinatum, also known as Chinese boxwood or Chinese box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, offering various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Neobotrydium carinatum include limonoids, flavonoids, and coumarins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Neobotrydium carinatum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
